title: Observer

slug.description: URL-safe identifier from displayName if provided (lowercase, hyphenated).

displayName.description: Optional display name (pseudonym, not real name). User's choice to provide.

anonymized.description: If true, tools should NOT correlate this observer across datasets. If false, observer consents to being linkable.

affiliations.description: Optional organizational affiliations (e.g., bird clubs, research institutions).

extensions.description: Tool-specific extensions. Keys must be namespaced: namespace.fieldName.

description: Privacy-conscious observer identity. Pseudonymous by default.
